name: Agent 3 — Hotel & Package | وكيل الفنادق والباقات

parameters.url: =https://api.amadeus.com/v2/shopping/hotel-offers?cityCode={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.destination }}&checkInDate={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.check_in }}&checkOutDate={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.check_out }}&adults={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.guests }}&max=5

=https://distribution-xml.booking.com/2.0/json/hotels?city_ids={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.destination }}&checkin={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.check_in }}&checkout={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.check_out }}&guest_qty={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.guests }}&rows=5

=https://api.hotelbeds.com/hotel-api/1.0/hotels?stay.checkIn={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.check_in }}&stay.checkOut={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.check_out }}&occupancies.rooms=1&occupancies.adults={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.guests }}&destinations.code={{ $('Extract Package Request').item.json.destination }}&fields=all&language=EN&from=1&to=5

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "customer_name": "{{ $("Extract Package Request").item.json.customer_name }}",
  "destination":   "{{ $("Extract Package Request").item.json.destination }}",
  "check_in":      "{{ $("Extract Package Request").item.json.check_in }}",
  "check_out":     "{{ $("Extract Package Request").item.json.check_out }}",
  "guests":        "{{ $("Extract Package Request").item.json.guests }}",
  "package_selection": "{{ $json.approved_option || "1" }}"
}
